_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the Kalmeda Tinnitus App, as evidenced by the title 'Kalmeda Tinnitus Study' and multiple mentions of the 'Kalmeda Tinnitus App' in the trial descriptions. The study aims to evaluate the effectiveness of this specific app for chronic tinnitus.
